name: Chocolate Almond Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, process the cookies and almonds until finely ground.
2. Add the almond liqueur and corn syrup to the food processor, and process again to mix thoroughly.
3. Line a large cookie sheet with wax paper.
4. Dust your hands lightly with powdered sugar.
5. Roll about 1/2 cup of powdered sugar into a small mound on a shallow dish.
6. Roll the almond mixture into 30 balls using slightly dusted hands.
7. Roll each ball in the powdered sugar to coat completely.
8. Place the coated almond balls on the prepared cookie sheet and refrigerate for at least 8 hours until firm.
Makes 30 candies.
